pairs.question: What are the names of the two expansion packs released for Battlefield 1942?
pairs.answer: The two expansion packs released for Battlefield 1942 are 'The Road to Rome' and 'Secret Weapons of World War II'.

pairs.question: Which platforms was Battlefield 2: Modern Combat available on?
pairs.answer: Battlefield 2: Modern Combat was available on PlayStation 2, Xbox, and Xbox 360.

pairs.question: List all the Battlefield games released by year in ascending order.
pairs.answer:
Here is the list of Battlefield games released by year in ascending order:

1. Battlefield 1942 - 10 September 2002
2. Battlefield Vietnam - 14 March 2004 (US), 19 March 2004
3. Battlefield 2 - 21 June 2005 (US), 24 June 2005
4. Battlefield 2: Modern Combat - 24 October 2005 (PS2/Xbox), 11 May 2006 (Xbox 360)
5. Battlefield 2142 - 17 October 2006
6. Battlefield: Bad Company - 23 June 2008
7. Battlefield: Bad Company 2 - 2 March 2010
8. Battlefield 3 - 25 October 2011
9. Battlefield 4 - 29 October 2013
10. Battlefield Hardline - 17 March 2015
11. Battlefield 1 - 23 October 2016
12. Battlefield V - 20 November 2018
13. Battlefield 2042 - 19 November 2021

pairs.question: What is the difference between a Booster Pack and an Expansion Pack in the Battlefield series?
pairs.answer: In the Battlefield series, Booster Packs and Expansion Packs are both downloadable content (DLC) that add new features, maps, or gameplay elements. The key difference is that Expansion Packs typically introduce larger content updates, often including new campaigns or significant gameplay changes, while Booster Packs are smaller updates focused on additional maps or minor enhancements. For example, 'Euro Force' and 'Armored Fury' are Booster Packs for Battlefield 2, whereas 'Special Forces' is an Expansion Pack for the same game.

pairs.question: Write a Python script to extract all Battlefield game titles and their release dates from the given text.
pairs.answer:
python
import re

text = """
The Battlefield series consists of the following first-person shooter games that were developed by Digital Illusions CE, and published by Electronic Arts:
Battlefield 1942 - (PC, Mac), released 10 September 2002.
The Road to Rome (Expansion Pack)
Secret Weapons of World War II (Expansion Pack)
Battlefield Vietnam - (PC), released 14 March 2004 (US only), and 19 March 2004.
Battlefield 2 - (PC), released 21 June 2005 (US only) and 24 June 2005.
Special Forces (Expansion Pack), released 22 November 2005 (US only), and 24 November 2005
Euro Force (Booster Pack), released 14 March 2006.
Armored Fury (Booster Pack), released 6 June 2006.
Battlefield 2: Modern Combat - (PS2, Xbox, Xbox 360), released 24 October 2005 (PS2/Xbox), 11 May 2006 (Xbox 360).
Battlefield 2142 - (PC, Mac), was released 17 October 2006.
Northern Strike (Booster Pack), released 8 March 2007.
Battlefield: Bad Company - (Xbox 360, PlayStation 3), released 23 June 2008.
Battlefield: Bad Company 2 - (PC, Xbox 360, PlayStation 3), released 2 March 2010.
Battlefield 3 - (PC, Xbox 360, PlayStation 3), released 25 October 2011.
Battlefield 4 - (PC, Xbox 360, PlayStaion 3, Xbox One, PlayStation 4), released 29 October 2013.
Battlefield Hardline - (PC, Xbox One, PlayStation 4, released 17 March 2015.
Battlefield 1 - (PC, Xbox One, PlayStation 4), released 23 October 2016.
Battlefield V - (PC, Xbox One, PlayStation 4), release date 20 November 2018.
Battlefield 2042 - (PC, Xbox Series X/S, Xbox One, PlayStaion 5, PlayStation 4), release date 19 November 2021.
"""

# Extract game titles and release dates using regex
pattern = r'([A-Za-z0-9: ]+) - .*?released ([0-9]{1,2} [A-Za-z]+ [0-9]{4})'
matches = re.findall(pattern, text)

# Print the results
games = [{"title": match[0].strip(), "release_date": match[1]} for match in matches]
for game in games:
    print(f"Title: {game['title']}, Release Date: {game['release_date']}")


This script will output:

Title: Battlefield 1942, Release Date: 10 September 2002
Title: Battlefield Vietnam, Release Date: 14 March 2004
Title: Battlefield 2, Release Date: 21 June 2005
Title: Battlefield 2: Modern Combat, Release Date: 24 October 2005
Title: Battlefield 2142, Release Date: 17 October 2006
Title: Battlefield: Bad Company, Release Date: 23 June 2008
Title: Battlefield: Bad Company 2, Release Date: 2 March 2010
Title: Battlefield 3, Release Date: 25 October 2011
Title: Battlefield 4, Release Date: 29 October 2013
Title: Battlefield Hardline, Release Date: 17 March 2015
Title: Battlefield 1, Release Date: 23 October 2016
Title: Battlefield V, Release Date: 20 November 2018
Title: Battlefield 2042, Release Date: 19 November 2021

pairs.question: Which Battlefield game was the first to be released on a console platform?
pairs.answer: The first Battlefield game released on a console platform was Battlefield 2: Modern Combat, which was released for PlayStation 2 and Xbox on 24 October 2005.

pairs.question: How many unique platforms were supported by Battlefield 2042 at launch?
pairs.answer: At launch, Battlefield 2042 supported five unique platforms: PC, Xbox Series X/S, Xbox One, PlayStation 5, and PlayStation 4.
